title: Senior SAP SAC / Datasphere Consultant (German Based)
raw_description:
We have a new freelance opportunity to support a German SAP Consultancy for an SAP SAC / Datasphere Consultant to join a greenfield customer project in Germany.


Role: SAP SAC / Datasphere Consultant
Project Duration: Initial 12 Months (Extension possible)
Location: Remote with occasional on-site near Dusseldorf, Germany
Start Date: ASAP
Language: English required (German a plus)
Workload: Minimum 2 days a week required (Ideally more)


Key Responsibilities:
• Design and develop analytics solutions using SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) for reporting and/or planning scenarios.
• Build and optimize data models and data flows within SAP Datasphere (formerly SAP Data Warehouse Cloud).
• Integrate SAP and non-SAP data sources using SAP BTP / Integration tools where required.
• Collaborate with business stakeholders to translate requirements into scalable reporting and planning solutions.
• Support end-to-end delivery including design, development, testing, and deployment.
• Ensure best practices
score_reason: Perfect match with high-value tech stack (SAC, Datasphere), mostly remote, low minimum workload, and agency posting.

title: Senior SAP IBP Consultant / Solution Architect – Planning & Integration
raw_description:
Summary
We are seeking a Senior SAP IBP Consultant / Solution Architect to lead design and optimization of advanced planning processes in SAP IBP within a global transformation program for a Pharmaceutical Manufacturer. The role includes ownership of solution architecture, stakeholder management, and delivery of scalable planning solutions integrated with S/4HANA and cloud technologies.


Tasks & Responsibilities
Lead end-to-end design of SAP IBP solutions (Demand, Supply, S&OP, OBP)
Define architecture and integration concepts (RTI, CI-DS, SDI, APIs)
Conduct requirement assessments and facilitate workshops with business stakeholders
Configure and optimize planning areas, key figures, attributes, and time profiles
Provide guidance to junior consultants and technical teams
Analyze complex planning or integration issues and design sustainable solutions
Ensure documentation quality and knowledge transfer
Support roadmap planning and continuous improvement initiative


Required Skills & Ex
score_reason: Strong modern SAP stack with IBP and S/4HANA integration but posted by agency with limited remote work details.

title: SAP BTP Application & Workflow Developer (m/w/d) | ANÜ
raw_description:
SAP BTP Application & Workflow Developer (m/w/d) | Arbeitnehmerüberlassung

Für unseren Kunden aus dem öffentlichen bzw. forschungsnahen Umfeld suchen wir Unterstützung als SAP BTP Application & Workflow Developer (m/w/d). Im Rahmen einer laufenden Transformation werden bestehende Prozesse modernisiert und auf die SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) überführt. Ziel ist die nachhaltige Weiterentwicklung einer zukunftsfähigen Systemlandschaft sowie der Aufbau interner BTP-Kompetenzen.

Allgemeine Informationen zum Einsatz:
Start: kurzfristig / spätestens 01.07.2026
Laufzeit: 6 Monate (Verlängerung möglich)
Einsatzort: Großraum München
Remoteanteil: ca. 60 % remote / 40 % vor Ort (nach Absprache)
Auslastung: Vollzeit (ca. 39h/Woche)
Vertragsart: Arbeitnehmerüberlassung / projektbasierte Beauftragung

 Aufgaben:
Konzeption, Modellierung und Implementierung komplexer Workflows auf SAP BTP (insb. SAP Build Process Automation)
Entwicklung von Anwendungen, Formularen und Benutzeroberflächen
